title: Model-maintainer / hub / consortium outreach + candidate model shortlist
context: Elyos's bar is 'delivered, not merged': a card that no one accepts is not a delivered outcome. The project has no confirmed model-maintainer or hub partner yet (verifiedNeed:false for all tasks). This outreach task opens dialogue with candidate channels (Hugging Face model authors, BioImage/MONAI Model Zoo maintainers, Zenodo, cancer-AI consortia) to find a realistic acceptance path, and produces a shortlist of candidate models for triage.
objective: Open at least one substantive maintainer/hub/consortium outreach thread and produce a shortlist of at least 5 candidate open cancer ML models for triage, establishing a realistic acceptance path for the M0 pilot.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one outreach thread opened with a named model maintainer, hub maintainer, or cancer-AI consortium contact; the thread, contact details, and response status are recorded.

A shortlist of at least 5 candidate open cancer ML models is produced with columns: model name/URL, modality, weights availability, model license (first-pass SPDX id), training-data sources (first-pass openness/access tier), and candidate acceptance channel.
Each shortlist entry notes a realistic acceptance path: informal author channel (author contacted and open to a model-card PR) or self-serve fallback (Zenodo, hosted card).
The outreach thread log and shortlist are committed to the project repo.
The pilot task (pilot-009) can reference this shortlist to select the pilot model.
resources: PLAN.md — Executive summary, Partner org, M0 cold-start de-risking
Hugging Face Hub; BioImage Model Zoo; MONAI Model Zoo; Zenodo; Grand Challenge
output: A committed outreach log and candidate model shortlist document, with at least one open outreach thread and at least 5 candidate models.
